<Case>
  <Domain>
    <Size x="3.0" y="1.0" z="1.0"/>
    <Resolution x="100" y="100" z="100"/>
    <Gravity y="-9.81"/>
  </Domain>
  <Particles>
    <Fluid>
      <Count>10000</Count>
      <InitialPositions>
        <Distribution type="uniform">
          <Range x="0.0 3.0" y="-0.5 0.25" z="-0.5 0.5"/>
        </Distribution>
      </InitialPositions>
    </Fluid>
  </Particles>
  <Boundary>
    <Solid>
      <Faces x="0 3" y="-0.5 0.5" z="-0.5 0.5"/>
    </Solid>
  </Boundary>
  <Motion>
    <Rotation>
      <Axis x="1.0" y="0.0" z="0.0"/>
      <Amplitude>0.0523599</Amplitude>
      <Frequency>0.55</Frequency>
      <Phase>0.0</Phase>
    </Rotation>
  </Motion>
  <Physics>
    <Viscosity>0.0</Viscosity>
    <SurfaceTension>0.0</SurfaceTension>
    <TimeStep>0.001</TimeStep>
    <Duration>10.0</Duration>
  </Physics>
</Case>
